input.user_input: Add a mutual representations section before the closing conditions in this merger agreement. Both parties should represent they have authority to execute.

actual:
It looks like you didn't attach or upload the merger agreement. 

If you upload the document, I can directly insert the new section and adjust the numbering and cross-references for you. In the meantime, here is a standard mutual representations clause that you can insert immediately before the closing conditions:

**[Section X]. Mutual Representations and Warranties**
Each Party hereby represents and warrants to the other Party as follows:
**(a) Organization and Standing.** It is duly organized, validly existing, and in good standing under the laws of its jurisdiction of organization.
**(b) Authority.** It has all requisite corporate power and authority to execute and deliver this Agreement, to perform its obligations hereunder, and to consummate the transactions contemplated hereby.
**(c) Due Authorization.** The execution, delivery, and performance of this Agreement by such Party have been duly authorized by all necessary corporate action on its part, and no other corporate proceedings on its part are necessary to authorize this Agreement or to consummate the transactions contemplated hereby.
**(d) Enforceability.** This Agreement has been duly executed and delivered by such Party and (assuming due authorization, execution, and delivery by the other Party) constitutes a legal, valid, and binding obligation of such Party, enforceable against it in accordance with its terms.

Please upload the agreement if you would like me to add this directly to the file!
